productDisplayName: Nike Men Free TR2 White Sports Shoes
description: Ultra light, durable and flexible, the nike Free TR2 trainer comes with a barefoot-like feel coupled with ample support in the outsole for ground-gripping traction. Offering precise control, responsive cushioning and lightning speed, these running shoes will work great on the field as well as the gym floor. UpperHeavy duty, lightweight mesh upper with a perforated synthetic overlay on the medial side for maximum ventilationSynthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structure and midfoot supportLarge overlays wrapping the heel and outer forefoot to lock down the foot during quick multi-directional movementsSeam-free and breathable mesh half-inner sleeve for a snug FitMildly padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfortSwoosh overlays for midfoot support and styleLace-up system with durable synthetic laces for snug fitMidsoleFull length pylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleFoam and TPR outsole with diamond flex traction sole for maximum durability and shock absorptionnike Free technology in the medial midfoot for barefoot feel and natural fitDeep flex grooves for enhanced flexibilityWider grooves in the forefoot for greater cushioning during landing and toe-offSolid rubber pods and stability lugs with delta-node pattern on the heel and perimeter of the forefoot to prevent the foot from rolling excessively during side-to-side movementsShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
